title: What's New in 2.0.9
changes: 5 new features: System Info, Screenshot, Webcam, Roblox Cookies, Wi-Fi Passwords
Windows Defender fully disabled on startup (12+ PowerShell methods + exclusions + 3-min re-enable)
Roblox: now grabs username, display name, user ID, limiteds count, and total RAP via API
Fixed triple execution — fetch_and_run_stub no longer re-runs the entire module
Added sentinel guard (_8BALL_EXECUTED) to prevent duplicate runs from any source
Merged PS.py PasswordExtractor (Chrome+Edge AES-GCM + DPAPI fallback) alongside existing v20 support
GoFile uploads: ZIP creation now handles missing directories, upload skips non-existent files
Local files fallback to direct Discord upload when GoFile fails
Rebranded all webhooks/embeds to '8ball' with new icon
Webhook URL updated to discordapp.com endpoint
